title: Hang during synthesis: Yosys enters an infinite loop during $dffe enable generation (or other pass), with no termination.

features.name: multi_driver_register_with_mixed_sensitivity
features.description: Code should include two always blocks that write to the same register, where one always block is edge-triggered and the other uses a combinational (level-sensitive) sensitivity list

features.name: register_driven_by_edge_and_combinational_always
features.description: Code should include a register that is assigned in both a clocked always block and a separate always block with a different sensitivity list that is not purely edge-triggered

features.name: negedge_in_sensitivity_with_posedge
features.description: Code should include an always block with mixed posedge and negedge signals in its sensitivity list

features.name: nested_ternary_in_register_assignment
features.description: Code should include a nested ternary operator (? : ) used in an assignment to a register within an always block
features.snippet:
reg r;
always @(posedge clk) r = (a | b) ? c ? d : e ? 0 : f : 0;
